description: A neuroradiologist needs a specific image from the CT Cranium DICOM dataset in InVesalius 3 for a teaching file showing the lateral ventricles. Adjust the axial slice view to a 'Brain' window/level setting (Window Width ≈ 80, Window Level ≈ 40) and navigate to a slice where the lateral ventricles are clearly visible. Export this axial view as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/brain_window_slice.png and record the selected axial slice number as an integer in /home/ga/Documents/slice_info.txt. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
